compiled_state.title: Unit test: ticket-reducer PRECONDITIONS corrupt-file skip with diagnostic log
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Gap Finding Source
Gap analysis: missing_error_path — T4's implementation notes mention corrupt-file skip behavior but the acceptance criteria do not test it. Without an explicit test, the implementation may silently swallow the corruption log or fail to skip (crash on malformed JSON).

## Objective
Add a test that verifies the ticket-reducer gracefully skips a corrupt (malformed JSON) PRECONDITIONS event file, logs a warning to stderr, and continues processing remaining valid events. This prevents the common failure mode where a single corrupt event crashes the entire ticket-show output.

## Existing Test File to Modify
- `tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh` — add test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped

## .test-index RED marker required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py: tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh [test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)
**test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir with 2 PRECONDITIONS event files — one valid (parseable JSON) and one corrupt (truncated/invalid JSON)
- When: `ticket-show.sh <ticket_id>` is run
- Then: exit 0 (not a crash); stdout contains valid JSON with `preconditions_summary` from the 1 valid event; stderr contains a warning mentioning the corrupt file (not silent)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped added to test-ticket-show.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped" tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh
- [ ] Test passes after T4 implementation
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ticket-show exits 0 on corrupt PRECONDITIONS (no crash)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh test_ticket_show_preconditions_corrupt_file_skipped 2>&1 | grep -v "^FAIL"

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
